title: Mushy Irish Potato Casserole
description: A comforting Irish dish with pillowy mashed potatoes, tangy nuka-pickle, and a splash of apple cider vinegar, served from a bamboo tray for a rustic touch.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C and oil a bamboo tray lightly.
Boil the peeled potatoes in salted water for 15 minutes until tender.
Drain the potatoes and mash them with a potato masher until smooth.
Stir in olive oil, salt, pepper, garlic, and almond milk until the mixture is creamy.
Fold in the chopped nuka-pickle, apple cider vinegar, and vegan butter substitute.
Transfer the mash into the prepared bamboo tray and spread evenly.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese and scallions on top of the mash.
Bake the casserole for 20 minutes until the top is golden and the edges are bubbling.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to settle.
Slice the casserole into portions and serve hot.
Serve immediately for a comforting Irish experience.
